member.name: T:BroMakerLib.Abilities.SpecialAbility
member.summary: Base class for all special abilities. Public fields are the JSON parameter schema.

member.name: P:BroMakerLib.Abilities.SpecialAbility.SourceBroType
member.summary: Vanilla bro to source special sounds from.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.SpecialAbility.triggerFrame
member.summary: Which animation frame calls `UseSpecial`.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.SpecialAbility.spawnOffsetX
member.summary: Horizontal offset from the owner's position used when spawning the special (projectile, grenade, etc.).

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.SpecialAbility.spawnOffsetY
member.summary: Vertical offset from the owner's position used when spawning the special.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.SpecialAbility.instantUse
member.summary: If true, `UseSpecial` fires immediately on press without running the animation.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.SpecialAbility.blockMovement
member.summary: If true, xI and yI are zeroed while the special is active via `HandleCalculateMovement`.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.SpecialAbility.deactivateGun
member.summary: If true, `DeactivateGun` is called during the animation.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.SpecialAbility.throwSounds
member.summary: Sounds played when throwing a projectile or grenade special.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.SpecialAbility.attackSounds
member.summary: Generic attack sounds (hit feedback, impact cues).

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.SpecialAbility.specialAttackSounds
member.summary: Sounds played for the special's main attack effect.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.SpecialAbility.Initialize(BroBase)
member.summary: Called once when the bro spawns. Also calls `CacheSoundsFromPrefab`.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.SpecialAbility.CacheSoundsFromPrefab
member.summary: Loads special sound clips from the `SourceBroType` prefab's soundHolder. Each array is null-guarded so JSON overrides aren't stomped. Override in subclasses to load additional bro-specific sounds (call `base.CacheSoundsFromPrefab()` first).

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.SpecialAbility.PressSpecial
member.summary: Called when the player presses the special button. Starts the animation or, if `instantUse` is true, calls `UseSpecial` directly.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.SpecialAbility.AnimateSpecial
member.summary: Called each frame while the special is animating. Advances the sprite, calls `UseSpecial` on the trigger frame, and ends the animation.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.SpecialAbility.UseSpecial
member.summary: Called when the special fires. Deducts ammo and calls `ActivateSpecial`, or flashes the HUD if out of ammo.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.SpecialAbility.ActivateSpecial
member.summary: Override to implement the special's effect (spawn projectile, apply buff, etc.). Called by `UseSpecial` after ammo is deducted.

member.name: T:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeStartType
member.summary: Controls how `StartMelee` initializes the melee.

member.name: T:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeMoveType
member.summary: Controls how `RunMeleeMovement` handles movement during the melee.

member.name: T:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility
member.summary: Base class for all melee abilities. Public fields are the JSON parameter schema.

member.name: P:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.SourceBroType
member.summary: Vanilla bro to source melee sounds from.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.startType
member.summary: Controls how `StartMelee` initializes the melee.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.moveType
member.summary: Controls how `RunMeleeMovement` handles movement.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.jumpingAnimationRow
member.summary: Sprite sheet row for jumping/dashing melee.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.jumpingAnimationColumn
member.summary: Starting column for jumping/dashing melee.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.hitFrame
member.summary: Which animation frame triggers the hit detection.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.restartFrame
member.summary: Frame at which a combo restart is allowed during `MeleeStartType.Knife` start. If the player re-presses melee after this frame, the animation restarts.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.endFrame
member.summary: Frame at which the melee animation ends and `CancelMelee` is called.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.hitFrameCounterDelay
member.summary: Extra time subtracted from the frame counter on `hitFrame`, creating a brief pause on the attack frame.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.attackOnFollowUpFrames
member.summary: Whether to continue calling `PerformMeleeAttack` on frames after `hitFrame` if the attack hasn't hit yet.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.damage
member.summary: Damage dealt to units on hit.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.damageType
member.summary: DamageType enum name controlling the unit-hit damage type. Parsed at initialization into `parsedDamageType`.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.parsedDamageType
member.summary: Parsed `DamageType` applied to unit hits by `PerformMeleeAttack`. Set from `damageType` during `Initialize`.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.knockbackX
member.summary: Horizontal knockback force applied to hit units.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.knockbackY
member.summary: Vertical knockback force applied to hit units.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.hitRangeX
member.summary: Horizontal range of the hit detection box.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.hitRangeY
member.summary: Vertical range of the hit detection box.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.hitOffsetX
member.summary: X offset from owner position for the hit detection center.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.hitOffsetY
member.summary: Y offset from owner position for the hit detection center.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.hitTerrain
member.summary: Whether melee damages terrain and doors.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.terrainDamage
member.summary: Damage dealt to terrain blocks on hit.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.meleeType
member.summary: Controls BroBase dispatch routing and TryMeleeTerrain sounds.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.forceDashingOnCustomStart
member.summary: When true, `MeleeStartType.Custom` start sets `DashingMelee = true` and pushes `xI` toward the target.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.meleeHitSounds
member.summary: Sounds played when the melee strike connects with a unit.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.missSounds
member.summary: Sounds played when the melee swing misses.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.meleeHitTerrainSounds
member.summary: Sounds played when melee hits terrain (knife-type melees).

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.alternateMeleeHitSounds
member.summary: Alternate hit sounds used by non-knife melees and terrain hits.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.Initialize(BroBase)
member.summary: Called once when the bro spawns. Parses `damageType`, then calls `CacheSoundsFromPrefab`.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.CacheSoundsFromPrefab
member.summary: Loads melee sound clips from the `SourceBroType` prefab's soundHolder. Each array is null-guarded so JSON overrides aren't stomped. Override in subclasses to load additional bro-specific sounds (call `base.CacheSoundsFromPrefab()` first).

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.StartMelee
member.summary: Called when the player presses melee. Behavior depends on `startType`.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.AnimateMelee
member.summary: Called each frame during the melee animation.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.RunMeleeMovement
member.summary: Called each frame to handle movement. Behavior depends on `moveType`.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.RunKnifeMeleeMovement
member.summary: Standard knife melee movement. Matches `TestVanDammeAnim.RunKnifeMeleeMovement`.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.RunPunchMeleeMovement
member.summary: Punch-style melee movement. Matches `BroBase.RunPunchMovement`.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.PerformMeleeAttack(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Override for custom hit detection (e.g., multi-hit, special effects).

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.CancelMelee
member.summary: Called after the base `CancelMelee` has run when the melee is interrupted (e.g., taking damage, falling). Do NOT call `hero.CancelMelee()` from here; the wrapper already invokes base first, then this callback.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.MeleeAbility.TryMeleeTerrain(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Performs terrain damage and plays the ability's cached sounds instead of the owner's soundHolder. Returns true if terrain was hit.

member.name: T:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase
member.summary: Shared base class for `SpecialAbility` and `PassiveAbility` and `MeleeAbility`.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase.animationRow
member.summary: Sprite sheet row for the primary animation.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase.animationColumn
member.summary: Starting column for the primary animation.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase.animationFrameCount
member.summary: Number of frames in the primary animation.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase.frameRate
member.summary: Seconds per animation frame.

member.name: P:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase.Direction
member.summary: Facing direction: 1 = right, -1 = left.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase.Initialize(BroBase)
member.summary: Called once when the bro spawns.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase.Cleanup
member.summary: Called before this ability is replaced by another.

member.summary: Called each frame during LateUpdate.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase.HandleAfterFixedUpdate
member.summary: Called after FixedUpdate each physics tick.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase.HandleSetDeltaTime

member.summary: Called before the bro reads and processes its input state.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase.HandleAfterCheckInput
member.summary: Called after the bro reads and processes its input state.

member.summary: Called when checking whether to suppress melee input for a high-five. Write into `result` and return false to override the wrapper's return value.

member.summary: Called when the player presses the special button.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase.HandleIsAlive(System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Called to check whether the bro is still alive. Write to `result` and return false to override.
member.returns: True to run original, false to use the provided `result`.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase.HandleRevive(System.Int32,System.Boolean,TestVanDammeAnim)
member.summary: Called when the bro is revived by a teammate. Pair with `HandleAfterRevive`.
member.returns: True to run original, false to skip.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase.HandleAfterRevive(System.Int32,System.Boolean,TestVanDammeAnim)
member.summary: Called after revive logic runs. Pair with `HandleRevive`.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase.HandleCheckNotifyDeathType
member.summary: Called to broadcast the death type to HUD and scoring systems.
member.returns: True to run original, false to skip.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase.HandleCheckForTraps
member.summary: Called to check whether the bro is touching any level traps.
member.returns: True to run original, false to skip.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase.HandleCanBeImpaledByGroundSpikes(System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Called to check whether ground spikes can impale this bro. Write to `result` and return false to override.
member.returns: True to run original, false to force the provided `result`.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase.HandleUseSteroids
member.summary: Called when the bro activates steroid mode. Pair with `HandleAfterUseSteroids`.
member.returns: True to run original, false to skip.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase.HandleAfterUseSteroids
member.summary: Called after steroid activation logic runs. Pair with `HandleUseSteroids`.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase.HandleIsInStealthMode(System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Called to check whether the bro is currently in stealth mode. Write into `result` and return false to override the wrapper's return value.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase.HandleAlertNearbyMooks
member.summary: Called to alert nearby enemies to the bro's presence.
member.returns: True to run original, false to skip.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase.HandleCanInseminate(System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Called to check whether this bro can inseminate facehugger-type enemies. Write to `result` and return false to override.
member.returns: True to run original, false to use the provided `result`.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase.HandleGetFollowPosition(UnityEngine.Vector3@)
member.summary: Called to get the world position that AI companions follow. Write to `result` and return false to override.
member.returns: True to run original, false to use the provided `result`.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase.HandleRecallBro

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase.HandleAfterRecallBro
member.summary: Called after recall logic runs. Pair with `HandleRecallBro`.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase.HandleAfterAttachToHeli

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase.HandleAfterDestroyUnit

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityBase.HandleThrowBackMook(Mook)

member.name: T:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityFactory
member.summary: Creates ability instances from JSON configuration.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityFactory.CreateSpecial(Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject,BroBase)
member.summary: Instantiates a `SpecialAbility` from a JSON config block containing a `"preset"` key.
member.returns: The instantiated ability, or null on failure.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityFactory.CreateMelee(Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject,BroBase)
member.summary: Instantiates a `MeleeAbility` from a JSON config block containing a `"preset"` key.
member.returns: The instantiated ability, or null on failure.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.AbilityFactory.CreatePassives(System.Collections.Generic.List{Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject},BroBase)
member.summary: Instantiates all passive abilities from a bro's `"passives"` JSON list, filtering redundant passives, deduplicating by concrete type, and enforcing `ConflictsWithPreset` declarations (bypassable via `"allowConflict": true` on an individual passive's JSON).

member.name: T:BroMakerLib.Abilities.PassiveAbility
member.summary: Base class for passive abilities, hook-driven behaviors with no dedicated button.

member.name: P:BroMakerLib.Abilities.PassiveAbility.SourceBroType
member.summary: Vanilla bro whose prefab is the source of this passive's sounds.

member.name: P:BroMakerLib.Abilities.PassiveAbility.IsRedundant
member.summary: True when the owner's base class already provides this passive's behavior; redundant passives are discarded without being attached.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.PassiveAbility.IsOwnerRedundant(BroBase)
member.summary: Override to return true when the owner's own class already hosts this passive's behavior (e.g. TheBrocketeerPassive on TheBrocketeer). Typically implemented as `owner is SomeBroClass`.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.PassiveAbility.Initialize(BroBase)
member.summary: Called once when the bro spawns. Sets `IsRedundant` and, if not redundant, calls `CacheSoundsFromPrefab`.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Abilities.PassiveAbility.CacheSoundsFromPrefab
member.summary: Override to load passive-specific sound clips from the SourceBroType prefab. Null-guard each assignment so JSON overrides aren't stomped.

member.name: T:BroMakerLib.Attributes.ConflictsWithPresetAttribute
member.summary: Marks this passive as incompatible with the named preset. If a bro lists both in its passives array, the first listed attaches and the later is dropped with a warning. Set "allowConflict": true on the later passive's JSON to bypass and allow both.

member.name: T:BroMakerLib.Attributes.ConflictsWithPresetsAttribute
member.summary:
Multi-preset variant of ConflictsWithPreset.
[PassivePreset("SuperGlider")] [ConflictsWithPresets("SnakeBroskin", "BrondleFly")] public class SuperGliderPassive : PassiveAbility { }

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.BroMakerUtilities.GetVariantValue``1(System.Collections.Generic.List{``0},System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the appropriate value from a variant list based on the variant index. Returns the value at variantIndex if available, otherwise returns the first item, or default(T) if list is empty.
member.param: The variant list
The desired variant index
member.returns: The appropriate value for the variant

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.BroMakerUtilities.IsBoss(Unit)
member.summary: Determines if the specified unit is a boss
member.param: Unit to check
member.returns: True if unit is a boss

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.BroMakerUtilities.IsBoss(UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Determines if the specified GameObject is a boss
member.param: Object with the boss component
member.returns: True if GameObject has a boss component attached

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.BroMakerUtilities.SetSpecialMaterials(System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.List{UnityEngine.Material},UnityEngine.Vector2,System.Single)
member.summary: Changes the specified players special materials
member.param: List of materials to set special to, if only one is specified, all icons will be set to it
Offset to move all special icons horizontally or vertically
Spacing between special icons

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.BroMakerUtilities.SetSpecialMaterials(System.Int32,UnityEngine.Material,UnityEngine.Vector2,System.Single)
member.summary: Changes the specified players special materials
member.param: Material to set special to, all icons will be set to it
Offset to move all special icons horizontally or vertically
Spacing between special icons

member.summary: Creates a Gib prefab. Be sure the Gib Holder is set to inactive or else your gibs will be destroyed.
member.param: Name of GameObject
Lower left pixel of gib
Width and Height of gib
Sets the local position of the object which is applied as an offset to the spawn position

member.name: T:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Projectiles.CustomGrenade
member.summary: CustomGrenade has all the default functionality of the Grenade class, with extra methods to make creating custom grenades easier

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Projectiles.CustomGrenade.SpriteAutoLoad
member.summary: Override Awake() and set this value to false to prevent the sprite from being loaded automatically

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Projectiles.CustomGrenade.StoredSprite
member.summary: Stores the sprite that was loaded if automatic loading is enabled

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Projectiles.CustomGrenade.CustomGrenadePrefabs
member.summary: Stores all custom projectile prefabs that have been created to avoid having to recreate them.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Projectiles.CustomGrenade.RanSetup
member.summary: Tracks whether the prefab setup has been run or not.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Projectiles.CustomGrenade.SpriteFolder
member.summary: Folder that contains your sprite image file. Defaults to "projectiles". Set this to "" if your grenades are in the same folder as your .dll

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Projectiles.CustomGrenade.SpriteFileName
member.summary: Name of your image file that will be automatically loaded. Defaults to "nameofyourclass.png".

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Projectiles.CustomGrenade.SpriteDirectoryPath
member.summary: Automatically gets set to the path to the folder your sprite is in. Don't set this manually.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Projectiles.CustomGrenade.AssemblyPath
member.summary: Automatically gets set to the path to the folder your grenade's assembly is in. Don't set this manually.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Projectiles.CustomGrenade.SoundFolder
member.summary: Folder that contains your grenade's sounds. Defaults to "sounds". Set this to "" if your sounds are in the same folder as your .dll

member.summary: Automatically gets set to the path to the folder your grenade's sounds are in. Assumes they're in a folder called sounds

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Projectiles.CustomGrenade.SpritePixelDimensions
member.summary: Size of one frame of your grenade. By default this will be the whole image, but if your grenade has multiple frames, you will want to change this.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Projectiles.CustomGrenade.SpriteLowerLeftPixel
member.summary: Sets the lower left corner of your sprite. Defaults to (0, heightofyourimage), which will include the whole image.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Projectiles.CustomGrenade.SpriteOffset
member.summary: Sets the offset of your sprite from the game object. Defaults to (0, 0, 0).

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Projectiles.CustomGrenade.SpriteColor
member.summary: Sets the sprite color. Defaults to white.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Projectiles.CustomGrenade.DefaultSoundHolder
member.summary: Sets the SoundHolder of the grenade. Defaults to Rambro's Grenade's SoundHolder.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Projectiles.CustomGrenade.Awake
member.summary: You must override this function for automatic sprite loading to work. If you don't put any code in your Awake() function besides base.Awake(), the sprite loading will attempt to use the defaults to load your sprite.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Projectiles.CustomGrenade.SpawnGrenadeLocally(UnityEngine.MonoBehaviour,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Spawns a grenade locally and enables it after spawning.
member.param: The MonoBehaviour that threw this grenade.
The X position to spawn the grenade.
The Y position to spawn the grenade.
The explosion radius of the grenade (passed to SetupGrenade but actual usage depends on grenade type).
The explosion force of the grenade (passed to SetupGrenade but actual usage depends on grenade type).
The initial X velocity of the grenade.
The initial Y velocity of the grenade.
The player number who owns this grenade.
Random seed for deterministic grenade behavior. Defaults to UnityEngine.Random.Range( 0, 10000 )
member.returns: The spawned Grenade instance.

member.name: T:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.ICustomProjectile
member.summary: Custom projectile or grenade

member.name: T:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.SoundHolderVoiceTypes
member.summary: Different types of SoundHolderVoice that are available in the base game

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.SoundHolderHeroType
member.summary: Set this to control which hero is used for the default soundHolder. If set to none, the base HeroType of your bro will be used.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.SoundHolderVoiceType
member.summary: Set this to control which hero is used for the default SoundHolderVoice. If set to none, the SoundHolderHeroType will be used, unless that is set to None, in which case the base HeroType of your bro will be used.

member.name: P:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.DirectoryPath
member.summary: Contains the path to the directory that contains your custom bro's dll

member.name: P:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.SoundPath
member.summary: Contains the path to your bro's sound folder (assumes the folder is named "sounds" by default)

member.name: P:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.ProjectilePath
member.summary: Contains the path to your bro's projectile folder (assumes the folder is named "projectiles" by default)

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.trackDeathRevival
member.summary: When enabled, CustomHero tracks death and revival state via and calls and at the appropriate times. Bros should check if (acceptedDeath) return; after base.Update() to skip their own logic when dead.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.trackInvulnerabilityTint
member.summary: When enabled, CustomHero automatically resets _TintColor to Color.gray on the main renderer, gun sprite, and all materials registered via when invulnerability ends.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.useCustomMelee
member.summary: When enabled, CustomHero sets meleeType and currentMeleeType to MeleeType.Custom in Start(), which causes the base game to call StartCustomMelee() instead of the default melee.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.blockGesturesDuringMelee
member.summary: When enabled, CustomHero's SetGestureAnimation override blocks gesture animations while doingMelee is true, preventing flex and other gestures from interrupting melee attacks.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.deduplicateVariants
member.summary: When enabled, the variant system ensures each active instance of the same bro type gets a different variant in multiplayer. Registration and unregistration are handled automatically through the lifecycle. Override and call directly to pass a filtered variant list.

member.name: F:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.acceptedDeath
member.summary: Set to true when the bro has died and is not immediately reviving. Managed automatically when is enabled. Bros should check if (acceptedDeath) return; after base.Update() to skip their own Update logic when dead.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.UIOptions
member.summary: Override this method to have UI options displayed for your custom hero underneath their name in the Custom Bros tab

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.HarmonyPatches(HarmonyLib.Harmony)
member.summary: Override this method to add custom harmony patches to your custom hero

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.RegisterCustomTriggers
member.summary: Override this method to add any custom trigger actions via RocketLib's Custom Trigger system

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.PreloadAssets
member.summary: Override this method to add your own assets to be preloaded when the game starts, to avoid lag when spawning as custom characters.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.PreloadSprites(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Preloads each sprite in the spritePaths list.
member.param: Path to the directory containing the sprites
Sprites to load

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.PreloadSounds(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Preloads each sound in the soundPaths list.
member.param: Path to the directory containing the sound files
Sounds to load

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.BeforePrefabSetup
member.summary: This method is called once after the prefab is created and before PrefabSetup has run. You can override this to set SoundHolderHeroType or SoundHolderVoiceType to control which heros your default soundHolder components are initialized from.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.AfterPrefabSetup
member.summary: This method is called once after the prefab is created and after PrefabSetup has run. You can override this to add additional variables to be set up in your prefab. The soundHolder, SoundHolderVoice, and soundHolderFootSteps will have been set up at this point, as well as directoryPath, so you can load sounds and assign them to these soundHolders to set up your bro's sounds.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.AssignDirectoryPaths(System.String)
member.summary: Sets up the DirectoryPath, SoundPath, and ProjectilePath variables. You can override this to adjust the paths if your sounds / projectiles folders are named something other than "sounds" and "projectiles"
member.param: Path to the directory that contains your custom bro's .dll

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.GetVariant
member.summary: Override this to customize variant selection logic
member.returns: Variant to spawn bro as

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.SetupAdditionalSprites
member.summary: Override this if you have additional sprites that need to be set up and showing immediately

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.SwitchVariant(System.Int32)
member.summary: This method switches the current variant and changes all assigned parameters to the new variant's values
member.param: Variant to switch to

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.OnDeath
member.summary: Called when the bro dies. Override to perform bro-specific cleanup (stop audio, drop items, reset state). Requires to be enabled. Always call base.OnDeath() when overriding to preserve variant deduplication.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.OnRevived
member.summary: Called when the bro is revived after death. Override to perform bro-specific revival setup (restore ammo, reset materials). Requires to be enabled. Always call base.OnRevived() when overriding to preserve variant deduplication.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.RegisterTintMaterial(UnityEngine.Material)
member.summary: Registers a material to be included in automatic tint color resets when invulnerability ends. Call this for any additional materials beyond the main renderer and gun sprite (which are handled automatically). Must be called after the material is created, typically in Start() or AfterPrefabSetup().
member.param: The material to register for tint tracking

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.ResetTintColors
member.summary: Resets the _TintColor on the main renderer, gun sprite, and all registered tint materials to Color.gray. Called automatically when invulnerability ends if is enabled. Can also be called directly for cases where tint needs to be reset manually (e.g. clearing invulnerability early).

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.GetUniqueVariant(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32})
member.summary: Returns a variant index not currently in use by other active instances of the same bro type. Falls back to random selection if all variants are taken. Used automatically by when is enabled. Can be called directly from a override to pass a filtered list of allowed variants.
member.param: Optional list of variant indices to choose from. If null, all variants (0 to VariantCount-1) are considered.
member.returns: A variant index not in use by other active instances, or a random one if all are taken

member.name: T:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.SaveableSettingAttribute
member.summary: Marks a static field or property to be saved/loaded as a persistent setting. Only static members marked with this attribute will be included in settings serialization.

member.name: P:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.SaveableSettingAttribute.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the custom name to use as the JSON key for this setting. If not specified, the member name will be used.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.SaveableSettingAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the SaveableSettingAttribute class.
member.param: Optional custom name to use as the JSON key. If null, the member name will be used.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.GetBroConfigPath(System.Type)
member.summary: Gets the config directory path for a custom bro type.
member.param: The custom bro type
member.returns: Path to the bro's config directory (e.g., Config/BroMaker/Bros/{BroName}/)

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.SaveSettings
member.summary: Saves all static fields and properties marked with [SaveableSetting] to a JSON file. The file will be saved to Config/BroMaker/Bros/{BroName}/ with the name format: {BroName}_settings.json
member.remarks: - Only saves non-null values - Automatically caches the custom bro information for better performance on subsequent calls - Caches the directory path for use with SaveAll() - If no saveable fields exist, no file will be created

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.LoadSettings
member.summary: Loads all static fields and properties marked with [SaveableSetting] from a JSON file. The file is expected to be in Config/BroMaker/Bros/{BroName}/ with the name format: {BroName}_settings.json
member.remarks: - Silently returns if the settings file doesn't exist - Automatically handles type conversion including enums and complex types - Logs errors for individual fields that fail to load but continues with other fields - Caches the directory path for use with SaveAll() - Uses cached custom bro information for better performance on subsequent calls

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.SaveSettings``1
member.summary: Saves settings for a specific custom bro type without requiring an instance.
member.typeparam: The custom bro type whose settings should be saved
member.remarks: - If the directory path is not cached, retrieves it from BroMakerStorage - Only saves non-null values - Creates or overwrites the settings file in the appropriate directory

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.LoadSettings``1
member.summary: Loads settings for a specific custom bro type without requiring an instance.
member.typeparam: The custom bro type whose settings should be loaded
member.remarks: - If the directory path is not cached, retrieves it from BroMakerStorage - Silently returns if the settings file doesn't exist - Automatically handles type conversion including enums and complex types - Logs errors for individual fields that fail to load but continues with other fields

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.Bros.CustomHero.SaveAll
member.summary: Saves settings for all custom bros that have been previously loaded or saved. This static method uses cached custom bro and directory information to save all settings without requiring instances.
member.remarks: - Only saves settings for custom bros that have been cached (i.e., SaveSettings or LoadSettings was called at least once) - Skips custom bros that don't have a cached directory path - Logs warnings for custom bros without cached directory paths - Logs success/error messages for each custom bro - Useful for application shutdown or periodic auto-saves

member.name: T:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.IAbilityOwner
member.summary: Interface for bros that support the ability system.

member.name: P:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.IAbilityOwner.Passives
member.summary: All passive abilities attached to this bro, in JSON-declared order. Do not mutate the returned list directly; use the bro's `AddPassive`/`RemovePassive`/`ClearPassives` helpers.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.IAbilityOwner.GetPassive``1
member.summary: Returns the first attached passive of type , or null if none.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.CustomObjects.ICustomHero.PrefabSetup
member.summary: Called once at prefab creation time to set up fields that would otherwise be lost during the component swap. Runs before any Awake calls.

member.name: M:BroMakerLib.Extensions.AudioClipExtensions.CloneArray(UnityEngine.AudioClip[])
member.summary: Returns a shallow copy of the array. Safe on null (returns null). Use when caching arrays from a prefab's SoundHolder so that accidental writes through the cached field cannot mutate the shared prefab data.
member.param: Source array (typically from a prefab's SoundHolder field).
member.returns: A new array containing the same AudioClip references, or null if source was null.

Value to assign (may need type conversion).
